data.title: Most crypto markets declined, with the GameFi sector falling by more than 5%, while only the CeFi and Meme sectors remained relatively resilient.
data.description: On April 15th, according to SoSoValue data, the crypto market experienced overall volatility and divergence, with most sectors declining. The GameFi sector fell 5.02% in the past 24 hours, with The Sandbox (SAND) and Axie Infinity (AXS) falling 2.41% and 1.94% respectively. Only the CeFi and Meme sectors remained relatively resilient, rising 0.40% and 0.23% respectively. Within the CeFi sector, Gate (GT) rose 2.52%, and Binance Coin (BNB) rose 0.66%. In the Meme sector, Binance Life continued its significant upward trend, rising 66.27%. Additionally, Bitcoin (BTC) rose 0.40%, reaching $74,000, having briefly surpassed $76,000 during the session; Ethereum (ETH) corrected by 1.28%, having broken through the $2,400 mark during the session. In other sectors, the PayFi sector fell 0.30% in the last 24 hours, while SafePal (SFP) rose 1.60%; the Layer 1 sector fell 0.53%, but TRON (TRX) rose 0.96%; the DeFi sector fell 0.68%, while Genius (GENIUS), which was newly launched yesterday, rose 24.72%; the Layer 2 sector fell 1.90%, and Mantle (MNT) fell 3.45%. Crypto sector indices reflecting historical performance show that the ssiAI, ssiSocialFi, and ssiDePIN indices fell 4.02%, 2.99%, and 2.30%, respectively.

data.title: RAVE broke through $19 and continued to set new all-time highs, with intraday liquidations reaching $29.16 million.
data.description: OKX market data shows that RAVE has continued its upward trend, breaking through $19 and currently trading at $19.2, a 24-hour increase of 135.1%, setting a new all-time high. In terms of contract data, approximately $29.16 million in RAVE positions were liquidated across the entire network in the past 24 hours, ranking third in terms of liquidation amount, behind only Bitcoin and Ethereum. Of this, approximately $5.16 million were long positions liquidated, and approximately $23.99 million were short positions liquidated.

data.title: Chinese memes continue their upward trend, with Binance Life's market capitalization surpassing $380 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the Chinese Meme sector continues its strong performance. Binance Life's market capitalization surpassed $380 million, setting a new high for the rebound, with a daily increase of over 74%; Hakimi's market capitalization exceeded $15 million, a daily increase of over 78%; GIGGLE's market capitalization surpassed $50 million, a daily increase of over 31%; and Gongjian's market capitalization surpassed $5 million, a daily increase of over 58%. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks. Meme coins generally lack real-world application scenarios and rely more on speculative sentiment; caution is advised when entering the market.

data.title: CZ: An AMA event will be held on Binance Square on April 15th at 21:00.
data.description: CZ announced on the X platform that he will be hosting an AMA live stream on Binance Square on April 15th at 21:00 (GMT+8), during which a Q&A session will be open, and 10 signed copies of his book will be given away. He stated that since the release of his new book, there has been active community discussion, including related content creation and topic discussions, and this AMA will be an interactive exchange with community users.

data.title: RAVE Price Surges to Record High with Significant Liquidations
data.description: RAVE has experienced a significant price increase, surpassing $19 and currently trading at $19.2, marking a 24-hour rise of 135.1% and reaching a historic high. According to Odaily, contract data reveals that RAVE saw liquidations totaling approximately $29.16 million over the past 24 hours, ranking third across the network, following Bitcoin and Ethereum. Of these liquidations, long positions accounted for about $5.16 million, while short positions amounted to approximately $23.99 million.

data.title: Farcaster clarified that it will not issue its own token, and related token discussions originated from the fork project Hypersnap.
data.description: Farcaster has stated that its protocol will not issue tokens, and the current discussions circulating in the market regarding "token issuance" are actually caused by the fork project Hypersnap. According to reports, the Hypersnap team referred to its token as the "Farcaster token" in discussions, leading to confusion among some users. Farcaster emphasizes that this statement does not represent its official position, and there are currently no Farcaster protocol tokens or airdrop plans. It also stated its aim to reduce the impact of bot accounts and scams on the network experience caused by this.

data.title: South Korea Faces Largest Import Price Surge in Three Decades Amid Oil Price Hike and Currency Depreciation
data.description: On April 15, Jin10 reported that South Korea experienced its largest import price increase in nearly thirty years, highlighting severe cost pressures in the economy due to the Iranian war-induced oil price surge and the depreciation of the Korean won. According to Jin10, data released on Wednesday showed that South Korea's import prices rose by 16.1% month-on-month in March, marking the largest monthly increase since January 1998, and increased by 18.4% year-on-year. Export prices also rose by 16.3% month-on-month, underscoring widespread inflationary pressures in trade flows. This increase reflects the significant rise in global crude oil prices and the depreciation of the Korean won. The Bank of Korea stated that in March, the price of Dubai crude oil nearly doubled from the previous month, averaging $128.52 per barrel, while the Korean won depreciated by approximately 2.6% against the U.S. dollar during the same period.

data.title: The Central Bank of Russia plans to require reporting of overseas cryptocurrency holdings.
data.description: The Central Bank of Russia announced plans to require its citizens to declare their overseas cryptocurrency holdings once a new round of cryptocurrency regulations takes effect. Vladimir Chistyukhin, First Deputy Governor of the Central Bank, pointed out that the new rules will strengthen KYC requirements for exchanges to improve transaction transparency. He emphasized that the regulations do not prohibit individuals or institutions from holding cryptocurrency assets in overseas wallets, but they must declare them to the federal tax authorities. This measure is expected to take effect in July along with the relevant regulatory framework. (DL News)

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Concept Stocks Strengthen in China
data.description: Gold-related stocks in China's A-share market have shown significant strength, with Baoding Technology hitting the daily limit. According to Jin10, other stocks such as Xiaocheng Technology, Xingye Yinxing, Luoyang Molybdenum, and Chow Tai Seng also experienced gains.

data.title: STOCKS | China's Onshore Stocks Recover Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: China's onshore stocks have rebounded, recovering losses incurred since the onset of the Iran conflict. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that China's market has outperformed the broader Asian market, driven by a more resilient economy and strategic efforts to shield it from potential oil shocks. This recovery underscores China's economic stability in the face of regional tensions.

data.title: Coinbase and Binance seek to integrate the Anthropic AI model Mythos
data.description: Coinbase and Binance are seeking access to Anthropic's AI model, Mythos, to enhance their ability to combat AI-driven cyber threats. Reports indicate that Coinbase has already begun discussions with Anthropic, and its Chief Security Officer, Philip Martin, stated that the model has the potential to accelerate the identification and defense against digital threats. Meanwhile, Binance and Fireblocks are also evaluating the model's potential applications in cybersecurity. (The Information)

data.title: Former U.S. Treasury Secretary Yellen Warns of Inflation Risks from Iran Conflict
data.description: Former U.S. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen has expressed concerns that the ongoing conflict involving Iran could lead to significant supply disruptions, potentially exacerbating inflationary pressures. According to Jin10, Yellen highlighted the interconnected nature of global supply chains and the potential for geopolitical tensions to impact economic stability. Her remarks underscore the importance of monitoring international developments that could influence inflation trends and economic growth.

data.title: An account with over $4 million in winnings purchased $150,000 worth of NBA play-in tournament game funds, resulting in the Trail Blazers defeating the Suns.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that in the Polymarket "NBA Play-In Game: Trail Blazers vs. Suns" prediction event, an account with over $4 million in profits (address: 0xdb27bf2ac5d428a9c63dbc914611036855a6c56e) purchased $150,000 worth of bets on the Trail Blazers defeating the Suns, with an average opening price of 42¢. The NBA Play-In Game: Trail Blazers vs. Suns will start at 10:00 AM Beijing time today. The winner of this game will face the Spurs in the first round of the playoffs, while the loser will compete against the winner of the Clippers vs. Warriors game for the last playoff spot in the Western Conference. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: AI TRENDS | US Treasury Secretary Praises Anthropic's Mythos for Advancing AI Leadership
data.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has commended Anthropic's Mythos as a groundbreaking development in artificial intelligence, emphasizing its potential to maintain America's competitive edge over China. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Bessent's endorsement of the AI industry leader, which has faced scrutiny from Washington due to its involvement in military projects. The Treasury Secretary's remarks underscore the importance of technological advancements in securing national interests and fostering innovation in the AI sector.

data.title: Kyobo Life Insurance and Ripple Advance Government Bond Token Trading to Live Testnet
data.description: Kyobo Life Insurance and Ripple have transitioned their government bond token trading proof-of-concept to a live testnet, marking a significant step in their collaborative project. According to NS3.AI, since their partnership began last September, the companies have been examining the South Korean regulatory landscape and exploring technical models, including stablecoin settlement and bond tokens. This month, the initiative has moved into a practical phase utilizing Ripple's institutional blockchain infrastructure to assess the feasibility of trading government bonds on-chain as digital tokens.

data.title: CoW Swap Restores Frontend After Error
data.description: CoW Swap has successfully restored its frontend on the official website following a previously disclosed error. According to NS3.AI, the Head of Technology, Felix Leupold, has advised users to ensure they use only the existing GPv2VaultRelayer contract address for approval signatures to maintain security.

data.title: Mirae Asset Securities to Enter Hong Kong's Retail Cryptocurrency Market
data.description: Mirae Asset Securities is poised to become the first South Korean securities firm to venture into Hong Kong's retail cryptocurrency market. According to NS3.AI, the company's Hong Kong subsidiary has secured final approval from the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission for a digital asset retail license. Mirae Asset intends to introduce cryptocurrency trading for individual investors in the city this June via a new mobile trading system.

data.title: South Korea's Inflation Expected to Accelerate, Says Bank of Korea Nominee
data.description: South Korea's inflation is anticipated to accelerate, according to Shin Hyun-song, the nominee for the Governor of the Bank of Korea. According to Jin10, Shin emphasized the need for careful monitoring of inflationary pressures and the potential impact on the country's economic stability. He highlighted the importance of implementing effective monetary policies to manage inflation and support sustainable economic growth. Shin's remarks come amid ongoing discussions about the challenges facing South Korea's economy, including global economic uncertainties and domestic fiscal policies. The Bank of Korea is expected to play a crucial role in navigating these challenges and ensuring economic resilience.

data.title: US stocks closed higher across the board in the crypto sector, with HOOD rising over 10.35%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.66%, the S&P 500 rose 1.18%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 1.96%. The crypto sector collectively rallied, with HOOD rising over 10.35%, CRCL up 6.9%, SBET up 6.57%, COIN up 5.66%, and MSTR up 3.82%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.
